overall.description: Gameplay footage from Marvel's Spider-Man: Miles Morales featuring the protagonist traversing a snowy Manhattan. The character runs through snow-covered streets, scales a glass skyscraper, and web-swings through the downtown skyline. The scene features clear winter weather with modern glass architecture and heavy snow coverage.

events.description: character jumps over a car hood while running

agents.ego_description: sprinting through snow-covered streets between parked cars and yellow taxis

notable_agents.action: yellow taxi driving slowly through the snowy street

entered.detail: bright yellow taxi cab with snow on the roof
row of parked cars covered in snow along the sidewalk
tall modern glass building visible in the distance
deciduous trees with snow-laden branches lining the street

segments.scene_description: The character runs through a snowy urban street lined with parked cars and bare trees. Yellow taxis and other vehicles navigate the snow-covered road while pedestrians walk along the sidewalks. Modern glass buildings rise in the background under a clear blue winter sky.

events.description: character launches into the air and begins web-swinging
transition from street level to aerial view overlooking the park

agents.ego_description: swinging through the air above a snow-covered park toward a glass skyscraper

entered.detail: snow-covered park area with bare trees and walking paths
distant view of the Statue of Liberty across the water
green playground equipment visible in the park below

segments.scene_description: The character leaps over a barrier and launches into an aerial swing, revealing a wide view of a snow-covered waterfront park. The Statue of Liberty is visible in the distant harbor as the character approaches the glass skyscraper. The perspective shifts from ground level to high above the park.

events.description: character attaches to glass building and begins wall-crawling upward
reaches the snow-covered rooftop at the top of the building

agents.ego_description: crawling up the glass curtain wall of the skyscraper using spider-powers

entered.detail: reflective blue-tinted glass panels of the skyscraper facade
reflections of surrounding buildings and sky in the glass surface

segments.scene_description: The character attaches to the glass skyscraper and rapidly climbs the vertical facade. The camera shows close-up views of the reflective glass panels with the sun glaring off the surface. The cityscape reflects in the building's windows as the character ascends toward the roof.

events.description: character launches from rooftop and begins web-swinging between buildings
swinging past a gothic church spire into the dense downtown canyon

agents.ego_description: web-swinging at high speed through the downtown skyline, launching from building to building

notable_agents.action: distant pedestrians visible on rooftops below

entered.detail: flat roof covered in snow with HVAC equipment
tall black gothic church spire among modern buildings
suspension bridge visible in the far distance

segments.scene_description: The character lands on a snowy rooftop, runs across it, and launches into a high-speed web-swing through the city canyon. The camera follows the character as they swing past a distinctive gothic church spire and navigate between towering glass skyscrapers. The HUD interface becomes visible in the upper corners showing health and web-fluid meters.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a grounded urban street level to a high-altitude traversal of the snowy Manhattan skyline. It begins with the character running through a snow-covered road lined with parked cars and yellow taxis under a clear blue winter sky. As the character leaps over a barrier, the perspective shifts rapidly from the street to a wide aerial view of a waterfront park with the Statue of Liberty visible in the distant harbor. The scene then moves vertically as the character attaches to a glass skyscraper, climbing the reflective facade while the sun glares off the panels and the cityscape mirrors in the windows. Finally, the camera follows the character from a snowy rooftop into a high-speed web-swing through a city canyon, passing a gothic church spire and towering skyscrapers as the HUD interface appears in the corners of the frame.
